# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    upstream_url: http://user-service:8080
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 1000

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    upstream_url: http://order-service:8080
    plugins:
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_size: 1048576

routes:
  - name: user-route
    service: user-service
    paths:
      - /api/users
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST

  - name: order-route
    service: order-service
    paths:
      - /api/orders
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: ["*"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
      headers: ["Accept", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Requested-With"]
      expose_headers: []
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: false

  - name: jwt
    config:
      claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
      key: "my_jwt_key"
